metric_accuracy_workstream.status: MECHANISM FOUND + FIX IMPLEMENTED (PR #25, awaiting device validation + owner merge decision)
metric_accuracy_workstream.verdicts: 69 skips: 62 genuine (11.5GB), 1 genuine near-miss, 3 proven device artifacts. Mechanism MEASURED on-device: constant one-frame skew (33.2ms @29.97fps) between Transformer probe clip and reference window reader; decode-order pairing scored inter-frame motion as quality. Cert path implicated too (false UNEXPECTED_REMUX possible).
metric_accuracy_workstream.fix: PtsAligner: timestamp-based pairing, adaptive half-frame-interval tolerance (floor 4ms), budgeted drops (max 8), fail-closed when unalignable; unmeasurable probes never feed the class latch; bars unchanged
metric_accuracy_workstream.next: device validation: 3-file rerun (jellyfish must score ~97+ and compress; screen recording honest scores), then 176-file rerun (62 genuine skips must stay skips); owner decides PR #25 merge
